message:
fix: isolate federation credentials to subprocess env, eliminating race window (bd-9k0c)

CLI operations (dolt push/pull/fetch) now receive credentials via cmd.Env
instead of process-wide os.Setenv, preventing concurrent goroutines from
inheriting wrong credentials. SQL operations retain mutex-protected process
env (required by in-process Dolt server) but with a narrower critical section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/ruby

Role: polecats
